title: dactylorhiza incarnata var. serotina
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata var. serotina, also known as the spotted marsh orchid, is a perennial orchid species that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata var. serotina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Dactylorhiza incarnata var. serotina is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is typically used in herbal medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and digestive issues.
